title: metalasia divergens subsp. divergens
intro: Metalasia divergens subsp. divergens, also known as the Cape plume, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to the southwestern region of South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Metalasia divergens subsp. divergens include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its possible application in wound healing and antimicrobial therapy. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a dried or powdered extract, or made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
